refnamediv.refpurpose: Sets the value for the given band that represents no data. Band 1 is assumed if no band is specified. To mark a band as having no nodata value, set the nodata value = NULL.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Sets the value that represents no data for the band. Band 1 is assumed if not specified. This will affect results from , , and the ST_PixelAs...() functions.

refsection.title: Examples
